reviews.comment:
Los playeros bien, amables y buena atención..  El SERVICOMPRAS DE UNA YPF ACA(  atendido por un hombre mayor, mala atención, cortante, no dice ni hola cuando entras y saludas, no tienen nada para vender prácticamente, agua caliente menos, te dicen que el agua no es potable… no es la primera ves que me pasa en un viaje en este lugar, esta ves lo expongo.. el ACÁ debería re plantear si debería continuar ese Concesionario a mi opinión)

(Translated by Google)
The gas station attendants were nice, friendly, and provided good service. However, the convenience store at the YPF ACA (run by an older man) offered poor service; he was curt, didn't even say hello when you entered and greeted me, and had practically nothing to sell, let alone hot water. They even told me the water wasn't drinkable. This isn't the first time this has happened to me on a trip to this location, but this time I'm bringing it up. In my opinion, ACA should reconsider whether this dealership should continue operating.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURSNll1YzdRRRAB
